disclaimer.banner: This service is not legal advice. Please consult a licensed attorney for specific legal decisions.

upload.title: Upload Your Contract
upload.file_hint: Supports JPG, PNG, and PDF. We detect the file type automatically.
upload.hero_body: Upload a Japanese contract — photo, PDF, or text. AI analyzes each clause for risk and delivers improvement suggestions in your language.
upload.flow_review_desc: Each clause checked against relevant laws
upload.trust_supported_types: Supports work, rental, and contractor agreements
upload.privacy_inline: The full contract text is deleted after analysis, and the report auto-deletes after 72 hours.
upload.ocr_notice_info_title: Recognition result is only a preview
upload.ocr_low_quality: The text in this image looks unclear, so the quote may be less accurate. Retake the photo or upload a clearer PDF or text version if possible.
upload.ocr_medium_quality: The text is mostly readable, but this quote is still only a preview. We will run formal recognition after payment.
upload.ocr_post_payment_notice: Pre-payment OCR is unavailable on this device, so formal text recognition will run after payment.
upload.clause_preview_unavailable: We will recognize the contract structure after payment and then show detailed clause titles.

pii.warning: Personal information detected. Please review before submitting.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.length_based_desc: The amount due is automatically calculated from the contract text length.
pricing.assurance_privacy_desc: Your contract is deleted from the server immediately after analysis
pricing.assurance_delivery_desc: Report link sent to your email as soon as analysis completes

payment.title: Payment
payment.waiting_note: Processing payment. Please do not close this page.
payment.success_note: Payment successful. Analysis will begin shortly.

order.screenshot_hint: Take a screenshot or copy this order ID so you can look up your result later.
order.save_after_payment_title: Save your order ID before analysis starts
order.save_after_payment_desc: Your payment is confirmed. Save this order ID now so you can reopen the result later if you close the page.
order.save_after_review_title: Save your order ID with the completed result
order.save_after_review_desc: Your analysis is complete. Keep this order ID so you can reopen the report again from the lookup page.
order.lookup_title: Open your result with an order ID
order.lookup_desc: Enter an order ID and we will send you to the correct page for payment, analysis, or the finished report.
order.lookup_not_found: We could not find that order. Please confirm the order ID and try again.
order.lookup_invalid: That order ID format does not look valid. Please paste the full order ID and try again.
order.lookup_network: The network looks unstable. Please check your connection and try again.
order.lookup_found_report: Report found. Opening the result page…
order.lookup_found_processing: Paid order found. Opening the analysis page…
order.lookup_found_payment: Pending payment found. Opening the payment status page…
order.lookup_help_body: If you keep your order ID, you can reopen the payment, analysis, or report page from here.
order.lookup_help_payment: Pending orders open the payment status page.
order.lookup_help_report: Completed orders open the report page directly.
order.next_step_body: We revealed the payment form below. Continue there to move straight into the analysis flow.

review.title: Analyzing
review.tool_analyze_clause_risk: Checking relevant laws and risk grounds...
review.phase_parsing_desc: Reading the contract structure and clauses...
review.phase_analyzing_desc: Analyzing each clause against relevant laws...
review.phase_generating_desc: Compiling analysis results into a clear report...
review.reconnect_failed: Unable to reconnect. Please tap the button below to try again.

report.title: Analysis Report
report.expires_in: This report will be automatically deleted in {{hours}} hours
report.share_text: I analyzed my contract with ContractGuard
report.language_locked_note: This report was generated in {{language}}. Changing the site language only updates the interface, not the report content itself.
report.share_note: The shared link opens the 72-hour report. The full contract text is never retained, but relevant clause excerpts remain visible inside the report.
report.network_error: The report could not be loaded because the network is unstable or the request timed out.
report.original_contract_session_note: This shows only the clause excerpt tied to the current finding so you can compare it with the analysis. The full contract text has already been deleted from the server.
report.original_contract_shared_note: The 72-hour report keeps only clause excerpts tied to findings for easier review and sharing. The full contract text is never retained.
report.comparison_hint: Compare with the original clause inside each analysis card
report.filter_hint: Tap these cards to narrow the report by risk level
report.filter_empty: No clauses match the current filter.
report.expired_title: This report is older than 72 hours
report.expired_body: For privacy, the report has already been deleted. Upload a new contract to start a fresh analysis.

errors.review_failed: An error occurred during analysis. Please try again.
errors.non_contract_document: The uploaded content does not appear to be a contract, so the analysis was stopped. Return home and upload contract text, an image, or a PDF.

footer.disclaimer: This service is not legal advice. Please consult a licensed attorney for specific legal decisions.

share.title: Share from a polished panel
share.description: Use a purpose-built share sheet with a promotional preview, copyable link, and native share when your device supports it.
share.preview_desc: ContractGuard reviews Japanese contracts and returns a clear risk report in your language.
share.point_fast: Fast analysis from photo, PDF, or pasted text
share.point_private: Contract text is deleted right after analysis
share.point_multilingual: Report delivered in your selected language
share.referral_desc: Invite a friend with your personal link. When they pay through it, both of you receive a discount on the next order.
share.referral_error: The referral link could not be prepared right now. Please try again in a moment.
share.referral_reward: You and your friend each get ¥{{amount}} off

privacy.summary: ContractGuard puts your privacy first. The full contract text is deleted from the server immediately after analysis. Only clause excerpts tied to report findings remain inside the 72-hour report. We only collect your email address, used solely to send the report link.
privacy.flow_step_1: Your upload is held only in memory or a temporary file while processing starts.
privacy.flow_step_2: AI reads the clause structure and checks each clause against relevant Japanese law.
privacy.flow_step_3: When analysis finishes, the full contract text is deleted from the server immediately.
privacy.flow_step_4: The report stays available for 72 hours, then is deleted automatically.
not_supported_list: Contracts mainly written in English or other non-Japanese languages
Handwritten contracts that are difficult to read
Post-signature legal disputes or litigation judgments

terms.summary: ContractGuard is an AI-powered contract risk analysis service. It is not legal advice — please consult a licensed attorney for binding legal decisions. No refunds after analysis begins. Reports are automatically deleted after 72 hours.

examples.section_desc: Explore AI analysis examples based on real contract scenarios
examples.full_report_note: This page shows a fuller sample that mirrors the saved report layout, including summary, filtering, and clause-by-clause analysis.
examples.rental_c1_reason: This clause requires the tenant to bear all restoration costs including natural wear and tear. Under the Civil Code and MLIT guidelines, normal wear and aging should be borne by the landlord — this clause may be unfair to the tenant.
examples.rental_c1_suggestion: Suggest amending to 'Tenant shall restore only damage caused by intent or negligence,' explicitly excluding natural wear and tear.
examples.rental_c2_reason: A 6-month notice period and 3 months' rent as penalty, while not unheard of in Japan's rental market, exceed the typical standard of 1–2 months. These terms are strict — consider negotiating.
examples.rental_c2_suggestion: Suggest negotiating the notice period down to 2 months and the penalty to 1 month's rent, which is closer to market norms.
examples.rental_c3_reason: A renewal fee of 1 month's rent is common in the Tokyo area, and the Supreme Court has upheld reasonable renewal fee clauses. This clause is within a reasonable range.
examples.rental_c3_suggestion: This is standard practice, but confirm before signing whether the fee applies to every renewal cycle.
examples.employment_c1_reason: A 2-year non-compete period is long, and covering all competitors nationwide is overly broad. Japanese courts tend to void non-compete clauses exceeding 1 year or lacking compensation.
examples.employment_c1_suggestion: Suggest negotiating to 6 months–1 year, limiting the geographic and business scope, and requesting non-compete compensation from the employer.
examples.employment_c2_reason: A 6-month probation is within the legal range (typically 3–6 months), but 'lacking aptitude' as a dismissal criterion is vague, giving the employer wide discretion.
examples.employment_c2_suggestion: Suggest requesting specific criteria for 'lacking aptitude' and confirming whether 30-day advance notice is required for dismissal during probation.
examples.parttime_c1_reason: Paying overtime premium only after 40 hours/month violates the Labor Standards Act. All hours exceeding statutory limits (8h/day, 40h/week) require at least 25% premium pay — there is no 40-hour free overtime exception.
examples.parttime_c1_suggestion: This clause is illegal. Demand it be amended to: 'Overtime premium of at least 25% shall be paid for all hours exceeding statutory working hours.'
examples.parttime_c2_reason: Requiring employees to compensate full damages is typically limited by courts, which usually award only partial liability. Also, deducting from wages requires the worker's written consent — otherwise it violates the full wage payment principle.
examples.parttime_c2_suggestion: Confirm whether the company has business liability insurance, and request that 'wage deductions require the employee's written consent' be explicitly stated.
